name: Banana Ragdoll
short_description: Banana Ragdoll is a game where you can be amogus and look at Bananas! You can destroy tall towers with realistic physics! There are 3 levels available to you and many character physical property settings.
detailed_description:
Banana Ragdoll is a game where you can run and look at Bananas!

Complete all 3 levels and get achievements for them!

3 levels in the game:

  • Level 1 - insane obstacle course platformer

  • Level 2 - sandbox for physics experiments

  • Level 3 - mountains from which you can fall epically in slowmotion*

*Slowmotion is available on any of the levels

Features:

Physics, Obviously.

Cool music

Achievements

We are interested to know what other levels you would like to see in the game and we will be happy to add them in the updates.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Polish, Russian, Ukrainian, Japanese
